top_signals.title: Remittances Lift India’s Current Account, Cushion War Shock
top_signals.summary: India recorded a surprise current account surplus in the January-March period as strong services receipts and higher remittances offset disruptions caused by the Iran war.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: JPMorgan Traders Cut Their Near-Term View on Stocks After Rout
top_signals.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co.’s trading desk is taking a cautious view toward US stocks following the selloff that erupted at the end of last week.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: FCA seeks injunction against Neil Woodford over ‘unauthorised’ investment advice
top_signals.summary: The financial watchdog has launched civil proceedings against former star fund manager Neil Woodford and his comeback venture over allegedly providing unauthorised investment advice. The Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) has started civil proceedings against Woodford and W Four Point Zero FZE, which trades as W4.0. The FCA alleges that Woodford and W4.0, which is registered [...]
